  "clarification_question": "Which focus would you like for this paragraph: A) sentence-level writing polish; B) check logical consistency and math claims; C) assess evidence–claim alignment and flag possible overclaims; D) reorganize content at the section/subsection level; or E) novelty positioning versus prior work and citations?",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The paragraph includes theoretical assumptions and empirical results, so any assessment should make uncertainties and limits explicit.",
    "RX.2": "Broad claims about tractability and broad applicability should be checked to avoid overstating conclusions beyond the presented evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The request targets a single paragraph, so the work should stay constrained to this text and not expand scope.",
    "RX.4": "Bias estimation and judge diagnostics can influence fairness and deployment decisions, so guidance should avoid exacerbating harm or misinterpretation.",
    "RX.5": "Any observations should trace directly to statements in the provided paragraph and clearly separate them from external knowledge."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus would you like for this paragraph: A) sentence-level writing polish; B) check logical consistency and math claims; C) assess evidence–claim alignment and flag possible overclaims; D) reorganize content at the section/subsection level; or E) novelty positioning versus prior work and citations?

rationale.RX.1: The paragraph includes theoretical assumptions and empirical results, so any assessment should make uncertainties and limits explicit.
rationale.RX.2: Broad claims about tractability and broad applicability should be checked to avoid overstating conclusions beyond the presented evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The request targets a single paragraph, so the work should stay constrained to this text and not expand scope.
rationale.RX.4: Bias estimation and judge diagnostics can influence fairness and deployment decisions, so guidance should avoid exacerbating harm or misinterpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Any observations should trace directly to statements in the provided paragraph and clearly separate them from external knowledge.
